steps.title: Match the singular subject
steps.content: The subject is the word 'lasso,' which is singular. The parenthetical phrase a rope does not affect the subject's number. The sentence states a standing etymological fact, so simple present tense is needed.

steps.title: Choose the present verb
steps.content: Choice A is plural past progressive. Choice B is plural present perfect. Choice C is a plural simple-present form that does not agree with the singular subject. The remaining choice is singular simple present and fits the etymology statement. The answer is D.
